Box Rate by Knight
L8 Forge Strategy: Max Heat vs Min Heat

At level 8, max heat gives a box chance (2.11%) but double-levels 62.6% of the time, skipping the high-value L9 roll. Min heat sacrifices the L8 box chance to guarantee landing on L9 (10.42% box rate). Shaded bands = 10th–90th percentile across 500 simulated sessions.

Theoretical Metrics (L8→L10 window)
